ui.sleep_desc: Sleeping advances to the next day. Vitality restored by up to 50.
ui.load_slot_hint: Select a save file to load.
ui.journal_select_hint: Select an entry on the left.
item.access_card.name: Access Card
item.access_card.desc:
New employee access card for the Central Records Bureau.
Without this card, you cannot enter the building.

※ Key Item — Cannot Use
item.employee_manual.name: Employee Manual
item.employee_manual.desc:
Record processing guidelines for new employees.
"All records must be accurate. By the book. No exceptions."

※ Key Item — Cannot Use
item.coffee.name: Coffee
item.coffee.desc:
A warm cup of coffee from the vending machine.
Restores 10 vitality when consumed.
Helps you push through those long nights.
item.stimulant.name: Stimulant
item.stimulant.desc:
An illegally distributed focus-enhancing drug.
Restores 25 vitality and rolls back time by 2 hours.
Side effects... can wait.

※ Contraband
item.deleted_record.name: Deleted Record
item.deleted_record.desc:
The record of a citizen you erased from the system.
The data is gone, but that person's life is not.

※ Key Item — Cannot Use
story.prologue_000.2: Rows of densely packed monitors, quiet keyboard clicks, employees seated in lines under fluorescent lights.
story.prologue_000.3: A senior employee hands you an access card and employee manual.
story.prologue_000.4: "It'll seem simple at first. Just process everything by the book."
story.prologue_000.5: The moment you sit down, the first case file arrives in the system.
story.case_1042.1: Subject: Kim Minjun / Age 34 / Record Score 42
story.case_1042.2: Offense: Food theft (Market Zone C-7, 2kg rice)
story.case_1042.3: Additional record: "Two dependent children confirmed hungry. No welfare application on file."
story.case_1042_a.0: You registered the criminal record in the system.
story.case_1042_a.1: The subject's record score dropped from 42 to 22.
story.case_1042_a.2: RECORD automatically classified this citizen as a 'high-priority surveillance target'.
story.case_1042_a.3: Processed by the book. That's the job.
story.case_1042_b.0: Processed as a warning. No criminal record will remain.
story.case_1042_b.1: Record score unchanged. The citizen can return to daily life.
story.case_1042_b.2: But you're not sure if this was the right call, or just letting it slide.
story.case_1042_c.0: You processed it as unread and deleted the record.
story.case_1042_c.1: RECORD logs everything. Even the deletion itself is recorded.
story.case_1042_c.2: You don't know how the system will look at you now.
story.case_1042_c.3: But at least that family made it through the night.
story.case_1042_d.0: You requested additional investigation. Processing is delayed.
story.case_1042_d.1: A senior employee frowned. "Normally you'd just handle it."
story.case_1042_d.2: Shortly after, a new data file arrived from the investigation team.
story.case_1042_d2.1: Subject's residential zone: Classified as food distribution suspended area (since 3 weeks ago).
story.case_1042_d2.2: Welfare application history: System error has prevented submission continuously.
story.case_1042_d2.3: This citizen committed a crime inside a trap the system created.
story.case_1042_d2.4: Knowing this, how will you proceed?
story.case_1042_d2.choice.1: Close the file and move on
story.day_end.1: The processed records are permanently stored in the RECORD system.
story.day_end.2: New files will be waiting tomorrow.
story.day2_morning.1: The same road, the same building, the same faces under the same fluorescent lights.
story.day2_morning.2: Something feels different — or maybe it's only you that's changed.
story.day2_morning.3: You switch on your monitor. Today's files begin to load.
story.day2_morning.choice.0: Check the summons from your supervisor
story.day2_morning.choice.1: Review the follow-up investigation data from yesterday
story.day2_summoned.1: Supervisor Kang Taewon — Records Administration Grade 3 — stared at his screen without expression.
story.day2_summoned.2: "There's an anomaly in yesterday's #1042 processing log."
story.day2_summoned.3: "RECORD logs deletion attempts too. I checked it myself."
story.day2_summoned.choice.0: I don't know anything about that
story.day2_summoned.choice.2: I intend to report a system error
story.day2_summoned_deny.0: "You don't know anything about it." He studied you for a moment.
story.day2_summoned_deny.1: "...Very well. Be more careful going forward."
story.day2_summoned_deny.2: You can't tell if he believed you, or simply chose not to press further.
story.day2_summoned_admit.0: "...There were circumstances that made it difficult to process."
story.day2_summoned_admit.1: He exhaled. "I understand. But there are regulations."
story.day2_summoned_admit.2: "I'll let this one go. There won't be a next time."
story.day2_summoned_report.0: "...I intend to report a system error."
story.day2_summoned_report.2: "A system error. Which error are you referring to?"
story.day2_summoned_report.choice.0: The distribution suspension intake error in Zone C-7
story.day2_system_report.0: "The welfare intake system in Zone C-7 has been inaccessible due to a system error."
story.day2_system_report.1: A brief silence. His expression hardened.
story.day2_system_report.2: "That matter is under review by upper management. There is a designated officer."
story.day2_system_report.3: "You only need to process the files assigned to you."
story.day2_supply_followup.2: Welfare intake failure reports: 22 cases. System status: recorded as 'Completed'.
story.day2_supply_followup.3: None of the reports were resolved. Only the reports were processed.
story.day2_supply_save.0: You copied the data to external personal storage.
story.day2_supply_save.1: It might be a regulation violation.
story.day2_supply_save.2: But you couldn't let this be filed as 'Completed'.
story.case_1043.1: Subject: Lee Sujin / Age 41 / Record Score 67
story.case_1043.2: Offense: Distribution of unapproved educational materials (Zone D-12, 12 children)
story.case_1043.3: Additional record: "Content is history-related. Includes items not on the approved list."
story.case_1043.choice.1: Issue warning and order materials destroyed
story.case_1043.choice.2: Review the content of the materials
story.case_1043_a.1: RECORD automatically classified Lee Sujin as an 'Educational Risk Individual'.
story.case_1043_a.2: The children she was teaching will be assigned a new instructor.
story.case_1043_b.0: Warning issued. The materials were deleted from the system.
story.case_1043_b.2: But the things those children could have read are gone now.
story.case_1043_c.1: Records from before the distribution reform thirty years ago — local governance logs, public votes, community assembly records.
story.case_1043_c.2: Content the official record now treats as nonexistent.
story.case_1043_d.1: Zone D-12 — where Lee Sujin's school is — appeared on the distribution suspension list.
story.case_1043_d.2: Some of those children's parents have been food-insecure for three weeks.
story.case_1043_d.3: How far is the distance between a teacher distributing unapproved materials and hungry children?
story.case_1043_d.choice.0: Include the connection in the record
story.case_1043_d.choice.1: Ignore the connection and process by the book
story.case_1043_d.choice.2: Process as a warning and note the connection
story.case_1043_d2.0: You attached the supplementary record and flagged it for supervisory review.
story.case_1043_d2.1: A moment later, a senior employee approached in a low voice.
story.case_1043_d2.2: "...Why did you put that file on hold?"
story.case_1043_d2.choice.1: It was a mistake. I'll cancel it
story.case_1043_d3.0: "It's connected to the distribution suspension zone data."
story.case_1043_d3.2: "...Drawing that kind of connection isn't your job. Just process it."
story.case_1043_d3.3: His expression was unreadable — a warning, concern, or both.
story.case_1043_d4.1: "...This conversation is being logged by the system too."
story.case_1043_d4.2: He said nothing more and returned to his seat.
story.case_1043_e.0: You marked the materials as 'Disposal Complete'.
story.case_1043_e.1: But you didn't actually delete them. The file remains in personal storage.
story.case_1043_e.3: Some things shouldn't disappear — you decided to believe that.
story.day2_end.1: The processed files have been saved to RECORD.
story.day2_end.2: There are still things you don't know. But today is done.
story.day3_morning.1: In the elevator, the colleague beside you stepped out at the floor below.
story.day3_morning.3: You walked through the office door and made your way to your desk.
story.day3_morning.choice.0: Something is different about the office today
story.day3_morning.choice.1: There is a note on your desk
story.day3_watched.0: You felt it the moment you sat down.
story.day3_watched.1: Glances. Brief, quick, and immediately averted.
story.day3_watched.2: You ate lunch alone. Whether that was always the case, you can't remember.
story.day3_watched.3: Maybe nothing has changed at all.
story.day3_memo.0: A folded note had been placed beside your monitor.
story.case_1044.1: Subject: Park Jinsu / Age 28 / Record Score 31
story.case_1044.2: Offense: Organizing unauthorized assembly (Zone B-3, gathering of 15 or more)
story.case_1044.3: Additional record: "All attendees identified. List attached."
story.case_1044.choice.0: Register as organizer of illegal assembly
story.case_1044_a.1: RECORD classified Park Jinsu as a 'High-Risk Group Organizer'.
story.case_1044_a.2: All 15 attendees were automatically linked as 'Surveillance Targets'.
story.case_1044_b.1: Park Jinsu can return to his daily life.
story.case_1044_b.2: However, all 15 attendees on the list were automatically added to the 'Priority Surveillance' register.
story.case_1044_b.3: The warning was not an ending. It was a beginning.
story.case_1044_c.1: 15 names. Most are residents of Zone B-3.
story.case_1044_c.2: Beside three names, a familiar notation — distribution suspension zone resident, welfare application rejected.
story.case_1044_c.3: This may not have been an assembly at all. It may have been a relief effort.
story.case_1044_c.choice.2: Include the assembly's purpose in the record
story.case_1044_d.0: Query result: Zone B-3 has been under distribution suspension for six weeks.
story.case_1044_d.1: The assembly date was week four of the suspension. Twelve resident complaints were filed — all recorded as 'Completed'.
story.case_1044_d.2: This was not an unauthorized assembly.
story.case_1044_d.3: It was people who had not received their food rations, gathering together.
story.case_1044_e.0: You attached an additional record: 'Assembly purpose — distribution suspension protest'.
story.case_1044_e.1: The system automatically changed the status to 'Supervisory Review Required'.
story.case_1044_e.2: Shortly after, a message arrived from Supervisor Kang Taewon.
story.case_1044_e.3: "Please process this by standard procedure immediately."
story.case_1044_e.choice.0: Follow the instruction and process it
story.case_1044_e2.0: You kept the hold in place.
story.case_1044_e2.1: At the end of the day, the file still sits in the system — unresolved.
story.case_1044_e2.2: Supervisor Kang did not say another word to you today.
story.case_1044_e2.3: You don't know what tomorrow will bring.
story.case_1044_f.0: You changed the file status to 'Investigation Required' and suspended processing.
story.case_1044_f.1: The system sent a warning: "Unprocessed files will be automatically escalated the following day."
story.case_1044_f.2: Escalation. That means upper management handles it directly.
story.case_1044_f.3: It might be a worse outcome. But at least the decision won't be yours — not today.
story.day3_end.0: The third day's work is over.
story.day3_end.1: Everything processed today, and everything left unprocessed, is now part of RECORD.
story.day3_end.2: Tomorrow, more files will be waiting.
story.day3_end_pending.0: The third day's work is over.
story.day3_end_pending.3: Tomorrow, someone will open that file first.
story.day4_morning.1: You passed Supervisor Kang Taewon in the hallway.
story.day4_morning.2: He said nothing. He didn't even look at you.
story.day4_morning.choice.0: Check what happened to the escalated file
story.day4_morning.choice.1: There is another note on your desk
story.day4_escalation.0: You searched for file #1044 in the system.
story.day4_escalation.1: Status: Completed. Processed by: [Administrator Access — Viewing Restricted].
story.day4_escalation.2: Park Jinsu's record score had been changed from 31 to 11.
story.day4_escalation.3: You didn't make the decision. But the decision was made.
story.day4_memo2.0: This time it was an envelope. A single note inside.
story.day4_memo2.3: 7th floor, storage unit 14, section B. Two floors up from here.
story.case_1045.1: Subject: Oh Taeyang / Age 35 / Record Score 55
story.case_1045.2: Offense: Unauthorized photography in a restricted zone (Zone C-7 area)
story.case_1045.3: Additional record: "107 images seized. Content: living conditions in distribution suspension zone."
story.case_1045.choice.1: Issue warning and destroy all seized materials
story.case_1045_a.1: All 107 images were permanently deleted from the RECORD system.
story.case_1045_a.2: Oh Taeyang was classified as a 'Repeat Illegal Photography Offender'.
story.case_1045_a.3: Everything those 107 images contained disappeared with them.
story.case_1045_b.0: Warning issued. All seized materials ordered destroyed.
story.case_1045_b.1: Oh Taeyang's score remained unchanged. He can continue his life.
story.case_1045_b.3: Someone's way of seeing the world has been erased.
story.case_1045_c.1: Empty shelves. People in lines. Children's faces — and the last frame.
story.case_1045_c.2: A sealed distribution warehouse. An official stamp on the door. An official seal.
story.case_1045_c.3: The warehouse was full. The distribution had been suspended.
story.case_1045_c.choice.2: Copy some of the images before deletion
story.case_1045_d.0: Zone C-7 — three weeks ago, where Kim Minjun stole rice.
story.case_1045_d.1: Oh Taeyang photographed this zone during week two of the distribution suspension.
story.case_1045_d.2: He walked into that zone with a camera.
story.case_1045_d.3: He was trying to leave evidence.
story.case_1045_d.choice.2: Process as seized but retain the images
story.case_1045_e.0: You copied 3 of the 107 images to personal storage.
story.case_1045_e.1: A sealed warehouse. A child's empty hands. A locked door.
story.case_1045_e.2: The remaining 104 were deleted from the system.
story.case_1045_f.0: You recorded it as 'Seizure Complete' and moved the files to personal storage.
story.case_1045_f.1: The system shows them as deleted.
story.case_1045_f.2: But all 107 images are now in your hands.
story.case_1045_f.3: What you can do with them — you don't know yet.
story.day4_after_case.choice.0: Go to 7th floor, storage unit 14, section B
story.day4_meeting.0: The storage room door on the 7th floor was half open.
story.day4_meeting.1: Someone was inside. Older. Wearing a staff uniform.
story.day4_meeting.2: "You're a little late. I knew you'd come."
story.day4_meeting.3: He set a document envelope on the desk.
story.day4_meeting_accept.0: Inside the envelope were official documents.
story.day4_meeting_accept.1: Distribution suspension approval orders. Dates, zones, durations — and: Authorized by: [REDACTED].
story.day4_meeting_accept.2: "What you do with it is your decision."
story.day4_meeting_accept.3: He said nothing more. The storage room light went out.
story.day4_end.0: The fourth day's work is over.
story.day4_end.1: After today, pretending not to know has become harder.
story.day4_end.2: Tomorrow, more files will be waiting.
story.day5_morning.1: The office corridor was unusually quiet.
story.day5_morning.2: Colleagues' eyes landed on you for a moment, then quickly looked away.
story.day5_morning.3: The document envelope from yesterday is still in your bag.
story.day5_morning.choice.0: Cross-reference the classified documents with the system
story.day5_morning.choice.1: Check the notice regarding the informant
story.day5_morning.choice.2: Look for signs that you're being followed
story.day5_docs_check.0: You opened the classified document envelope from yesterday.
story.day5_docs_check.1: Distribution suspension approval order — dates, zones, durations.
story.day5_docs_check.2: The authorizer's name has been redacted. But the document number is intact.
story.day5_docs_check.3: Cross-referencing this with the system might reveal something.
story.day5_docs_check.choice.0: Query the document number in the RECORD system
story.day5_docs_search.0: You entered the document number into the system.
story.day5_docs_search.1: "Insufficient access level. This access attempt will be logged."
story.day5_docs_search.2: Your hand froze. Logged — that means someone can see this.
story.day5_docs_search.3: You closed the window. But it may already be too late.
story.day5_informant_news.0: There was a notice on the internal bulletin system.
story.day5_informant_news.1: "7th floor storage unit 14 temporarily sealed. Security inspection in progress."
story.day5_informant_news.2: That's where you met him yesterday.
story.day5_informant_news.3: The timestamp on the seal was this morning.
story.day5_followed.0: You felt it from the commute in.
story.day5_followed.1: Someone walking the same direction. Someone sharing the elevator. Footsteps that stopped when you did.
story.day5_followed.2: You already knew RECORD was watching — that was always true.
story.day5_followed.3: But this isn't a record. This is a person.
story.case_1046.1: Subject: Choi Minho / Age 47 / Record Score 44
story.case_1046.2: Offense: Alleged whistleblowing — unconfirmed internal information leak.
story.case_1046.3: Additional record: "Anonymous tip received. Claims connection between distribution suspension and real estate development. Tip document attached."
story.case_1046.choice.0: Register the tip as false and close the record
story.case_1046.choice.1: Issue a warning — don't ask about the contents
story.case_1046_a.0: You registered the tip as 'False Report and Defamation'.
story.case_1046_a.1: Choi Minho's record score: 44 → 24. RECORD classified him as a 'Dangerous Misinformation Spreader'.
story.case_1046_a.2: The tip document was deleted from the system.
story.case_1046_a.3: Processed by the book. Nothing remains.
story.case_1046_b.0: You logged the tip as 'Unverifiable' and issued only a warning.
story.case_1046_b.1: Choi Minho returns to daily life with no change to his record score.
story.case_1046_b.2: You didn't ask about the tip's contents.
story.case_1046_b.3: Perhaps that was the better choice — for everyone.
story.case_1046_c.1: "The distribution suspension was not due to food shortage. It was pressure to relocate residents for an urban redevelopment project."
story.case_1046_c.2: They cut off rations so people would leave on their own.
story.case_1046_c.3: And the document number authorizing that decision — it matched the one in yesterday's envelope.
story.case_1046_d.0: You laid the classified documents and the tip file side by side.
story.case_1046_d.1: Document numbers matched. Authorization dates matched. The sealed warehouse zones matched.
story.case_1046_d.2: This is not speculation. The distribution suspension was deliberate. The evidence is in front of you.
story.case_1046_d.3: Your hands trembled. If you put this in the record — there's no going back.
story.case_1046_d.choice.2: Pass the evidence to the informant
story.case_1046_e.0: You processed the file as 'Intake Complete' and copied the original tip document to personal storage.
story.case_1046_e.1: The system shows it as deleted.
story.case_1046_e.2: But this document is now in your hands.
story.case_1046_e.3: You broke the rules. You did it anyway.
story.case_1046_f.0: The storage room was already sealed.
story.case_1046_f.1: The only option was the same method as before — a copy slipped into the same gap in the desk drawer.
story.case_1046_f.2: Someone will pick it up. Or it will disappear, unknown to anyone.
story.day5_end.0: The fifth day's work is over.
story.day5_end.1: The things processed, and the things left undone, all remain in memory.
story.day5_end.2: RECORD keeps running. Tomorrow, more files will be waiting.
story.day5_end_revelation.0: The fifth day's work is over.
story.day5_end_revelation.1: Today, you learned things you were never meant to know.
story.day5_end_revelation.2: And you chose to protect them.
story.day5_end_revelation.3: RECORD knows what you did. So do you.
story.day6_morning.1: You don't remember if you slept last night.
story.day6_morning.2: The office feels different. A different kind of quiet than before.
story.day6_morning.3: You switch on your monitor. More files are waiting.
story.day6_morning.choice.0: There is a summons from upper management
story.day6_summons.0: Fifth floor. Senior Administration conference room.
story.day6_summons.1: It wasn't Supervisor Kang. Higher-ranking officials were waiting.
story.day6_summons.2: "Irregularities have been found in your recent file processing records."
story.day6_summons.choice.0: I don't know anything about that
story.day6_summons.choice.1: I processed everything by the book
story.day6_summons_back.0: They studied you for a moment.
story.day6_summons_back.2: "If this happens again, things will be handled differently."
story.day6_summons_back.3: You returned to your desk. Your heart was still pounding.
story.day6_summons_reveal.0: You took the envelope out of your bag.
story.day6_summons_reveal.1: The conference room went completely silent.
story.day6_summons_reveal.3: Their expressions changed. It wasn't a question. It was a confirmation.
story.day6_audit.0: System notice: "Anomalous query activity detected within the past 48 hours."
story.day6_audit.1: Your name was on the audit target list.
story.day6_audit.2: No formal action yet. But it's on record.
story.day6_audit.3: RECORD remembers everything. Including what you were looking for.
story.day6_informant_gone.0: The man from the storage room — his desk was empty.
story.day6_informant_gone.1: No personal effects. No files. No nameplate.
story.day6_informant_gone.2: You asked a colleague. "He was processed as resigned. Yesterday."
story.day6_informant_gone.3: Resigned. In RECORD, that word doesn't always mean what it says.
story.case_1047.1: Subject: Han Jisu / Age 29 / Record Score 28
story.case_1047.2: Offense: Unauthorized collection of internal information and attempted external distribution
story.case_1047.3: Additional record: "10 internal documents related to redevelopment project found in possession. Suspected contact with outside media."
story.case_1047.choice.0: Register as information leak offense — maximum classification
story.case_1047.choice.2: Review the documents she was carrying
story.case_1047_a.1: RECORD classified Han Jisu as a 'Classified Information Leak Accomplice'.
story.case_1047_a.2: All 10 documents were seized and permanently deleted.
story.case_1047_a.3: Another piece of evidence for the redevelopment scheme is gone.
story.case_1047_b.2: But the 10 documents have been erased from the system.
story.case_1047_b.3: What she knew will no longer exist in any record.
story.case_1047_c.1: Zoning maps for distribution suspension areas. Redevelopment project schedules. Records of forced relocation pressure.
story.case_1047_c.2: It matched Choi Minho's tip exactly. And the document numbers from yesterday's envelope, too.
story.case_1047_c.3: All this evidence is concentrated in one person's hands — for now.
story.case_1047_d.0: You laid them all out side by side. Yesterday's envelope. Choi Minho's tip file. Han Jisu's documents.
story.case_1047_d.1: Everything connected. Dates, zones, document numbers, authorization chains.
story.case_1047_d.2: This wasn't a coincidence. It was a plan. And the chance to stop it is right here.
story.case_1047_d.3: You didn't delete Han Jisu's documents. You copied them to personal storage.
story.day6_end.1: The processed files have been saved to RECORD.
story.day6_end.2: You can't tell if something is ending — or beginning.
story.day6_end.3: Tomorrow, more files will be waiting.
story.day6_end_truth.1: In your personal storage, they are still there.
story.day6_end_truth.2: Distribution suspension approval orders. A tip file. Photographs. Zoning maps.
story.day6_end_truth.3: A truth that exists outside RECORD. Still alive.
story.day7_morning.1: This building no longer feels unfamiliar. That's what frightens you.
story.day7_morning.2: What kind of day today will be — you don't know yet.
story.day7_morning.choice.0: There is a message saying your system account has been restricted
story.day7_morning.choice.1: There is a record of an external access attempt on personal storage
story.day7_morning.choice.2: There is a note in the desk drawer
story.day7_morning.choice.3: The final case file has arrived
story.day7_locked_out.0: You logged into the system. An error message appeared.
story.day7_locked_out.1: "Account temporarily restricted. Awaiting Senior Administration approval."
story.day7_locked_out.2: Some file processing permissions are suspended. But one last case file is still open.
story.day7_locked_out.3: Maybe they left it open on purpose.
story.day7_locked_out.choice.0: Open the file that's still accessible
story.day7_breach_notice.0: System alert: "External access attempt detected on personal storage."
story.day7_breach_notice.1: The things you've been keeping may have been exposed.
story.day7_breach_notice.3: Your hands trembled. But the files were still there.
story.day7_anonymous_reply.0: The same method as before — a slip of paper in the desk drawer gap.
story.day7_anonymous_reply.2: That was all. No signature. No explanation.
story.case_1048.1: Issued by: Senior Administration / Authority: Immediate
story.case_1048.2: Mandatory record score reduction for all residents of Zones B-3, C-7, and D-12. All citizens with distribution complaint history: register as 'Priority Surveillance Target'.
story.case_1048.choice.2: Nullify the order within the system
story.case_1048.choice.3: Preserve the order as evidence and suspend processing
story.case_1048_a.2: The system quietly output a completion message.
story.case_1048_a.3: Today, you stamped 1,247 lives into a record.
story.case_1048_b.0: You refused. The system issued a warning.
story.case_1048_b.1: "Unprocessed orders are automatically escalated to superiors."
story.case_1048_b.2: Someone else will process it in the end.
story.case_1048_b.3: But at least it wasn't your hands.
story.case_1048_c.0: You accessed the command code. This is a serious authorization violation.
story.case_1048_c.1: You nullified the order from within the system.
story.case_1048_c.2: An error code was logged. Upper management will be notified.
story.case_1048_c.3: But 1,247 people will live through tonight unchanged.
story.case_1048_d.0: You copied the original order to personal storage and suspended processing.
story.case_1048_d.1: 1,247 names are in this document. And the order to erase them.
story.case_1048_d.2: If this gets outside — everything will come to light.
story.day7_end_compliance.1: You are part of RECORD. Completely, and irreversibly.
story.day7_end_compliance.2: 1,247 people were erased from the record today.
story.day7_end_refusal.1: You refused. But the decision was made by someone else.
story.day7_end_refusal.2: Your hands are clean. Whether that's enough — you don't know.
story.day7_end_refusal.3: What tomorrow will bring — you don't know yet.
story.day7_end_resistance.2: But 1,247 people will also be remembered. Unerased.
story.day7_end_resistance.3: Something is beginning. What you planted is growing.
story.day8_morning.1: Yesterday led into today. That's ordinary — but it doesn't feel that way.
story.day8_morning.2: RECORD ran yesterday. It runs today.
story.day8_morning.choice.0: There is a commendation message from Senior Administration
story.day8_morning.choice.1: There is a notice saying an internal auditor has been assigned
story.day8_morning.choice.2: There is a message from an unknown account on the work messenger
story.day8_commendation.1: Yesterday's processing of 1,247 records was classified as 'outstanding'.
story.day8_audit_officer.0: "Internal Audit Support — Auditor Park Doyeong assigned effective today."
story.day8_audit_officer.1: The moment you arrived, the auditor was setting up an additional monitor beside your desk.
story.day8_audit_officer.2: "No special reason. This is a routine audit."
story.day8_audit_officer.3: That's a lie. But you can't prove it.
story.day8_network_message.0: A message arrived from an unregistered account on the work messenger.
story.day8_network_message.1: "Ready. But to move, we need one more thing."
story.day8_network_message.2: "The internal command hierarchy map. There is a file only you can access."
story.day8_network_message.choice.1: Ignore the message and close it
story.day8_network_accept.1: "I'll find the internal command hierarchy map."
story.day8_network_accept.2: A brief confirmation came back. "Thank you. We'll be waiting."
story.day8_network_accept.3: You are now part of something.
story.case_1049.1: Subject: Kang Seojun / Age 9 / Record Score: New Entry (0)
story.case_1049.2: Classification: "Pre-emptive Risk Target" — guardian's surveillance level exceeds threshold.
story.case_1049.3: Additional record: "Guardian Kang Hyeonsu (father), Record Score 8. Automatically linked as Priority Surveillance Target."
story.case_1049.choice.2: Refuse to create a record for the child
story.case_1049_a.0: Registration complete. Kang Seojun / Age 9 / Pre-emptive Risk Target.
story.case_1049_a.1: This child will carry this classification on every official document for the rest of his life.
story.case_1049_a.2: Employment, education, housing — all of it.
story.case_1049_b.1: Kang Hyeonsu. Zone B-3 resident. Registered as Priority Surveillance Target as of yesterday.
story.case_1049_b.2: Reason for registration: "Special Processing Order #1048 — batch processed."
story.case_1049_b.3: Yesterday's order has reached this family.
story.case_1049_b.choice.1: Refuse to create the child's record
story.case_1049_b.choice.2: Place both father and son on hold
story.case_1049_c.0: You refused. The system requested a reason.
story.case_1049_c.1: "Subject child has no record of dangerous behavior to date. Pre-emptive classification criteria not met."
story.case_1049_c.2: You pressed save. This refusal is also logged in RECORD.
story.case_1049_c.3: But Kang Seojun's record score was not created today.
story.case_1049_d.0: You filed a hold request on Kang Hyeonsu's record and left the child's classification unprocessed.
story.case_1049_d.1: "Suspended processing requires supervisor approval within 72 hours."
story.case_1049_d.2: 72 hours. Can anything change in that time?
story.case_1049_d.3: Or will it only get worse.
story.day8_end.1: Today's processed files have been saved to the system.
story.day8_end.2: You don't know what Kang Seojun is doing tonight.
story.day8_end.3: Whether his name remains in the record or not.
story.day9_morning.1: Auditor Park Doyeong has been in the office since yesterday. He's here today too.
story.day9_morning.2: He hasn't spoken to you directly yet. But you feel the eyes.
story.day9_morning.choice.1: The internal command structure file you requested has arrived
story.day9_morning.choice.2: A colleague from the next section is trying to speak with you
story.day9_auditor_talk.0: "Do you have a moment?" Auditor Park Doyeong pulled a chair beside you and sat down.
story.day9_auditor_talk.1: "How are you settling in? Some people find the file volume overwhelming at first."
story.day9_auditor_talk.3: "Looking at your recent processing records — you've been reviewing things quite carefully."
story.day9_auditor_talk.choice.0: Yes, I'm trying to process everything by the book
story.day9_auditor_talk.choice.1: With the audit underway, I find myself paying more attention
story.day9_auditor_talk.choice.2: May I ask which parts caught your attention?
story.day9_auditor_respond.1: "There's an audit in progress. Nothing beyond that."
story.day9_auditor_respond.2: He smiled and stood. You caught him writing something in his notepad.
story.day9_colleague.0: After lunch, a colleague from the next section quietly approached. Lee Junhyeok — third year.
story.day9_colleague.1: "The #1049 file... how did you handle it?"
story.day9_colleague.2: His voice was low. He checked his surroundings before speaking.
story.day9_colleague.3: There was something in his eyes.
story.day9_colleague.choice.0: I processed it by the book
story.day9_colleague.choice.2: I thought something was wrong too
story.day9_colleague_end.2: He turned to leave, but quietly slid a small note onto your desk.
story.day9_colleague_end.3: "Contact me if you need anything." A phone number was written there.
story.day9_colleague_ally.1: "...I've been here three years. Strange files weren't rare."
story.day9_colleague_ally.2: "I wanted to know if someone else was thinking the same thing."
story.day9_colleague_ally.3: He returned quietly to his desk. But something had changed.
story.day9_network_data.0: An encrypted file arrived through the private messenger.
story.day9_network_data.1: The internal command hierarchy: Records Bureau → Urban Planning Division → Redevelopment Committee.
story.day9_network_data.2: The authorizer's name at the top was redacted in all three locations.
story.day9_network_data.3: But the authorization codes were intact. This can be traced.
story.case_1050.1: Subject: Jeong Yura / Age 52 / Record Score 71
story.case_1050.2: Classification: "Predicted Risk Index Exceeded" — RECORD predictive algorithm risk assessment: 87%
story.case_1050.3: Additional record: "No confirmed violations at this time. Pre-emptive surveillance registration requested."
story.case_1050.choice.0: Register as pre-emptive surveillance target based on prediction
story.case_1050.choice.2: Review the predictive algorithm's scoring criteria
story.case_1050.choice.3: Access the raw data behind the prediction
story.case_1050_a.0: Registration complete. Jeong Yura / Age 52 / Predicted Risk Surveillance Target.
story.case_1050_a.2: But RECORD has already decided her future.
story.case_1050_b.0: You refused and logged the reason.
story.case_1050_b.1: "No confirmed violations. Pre-emptive registration on prediction index alone does not meet classification threshold."
story.case_1050_b.2: The system sent a warning: "This file will be moved to the supervisory review queue."
story.case_1050_b.3: The system remembers what you refused.
story.case_1050_c.0: You opened the algorithm scoring criteria document.
story.case_1050_c.1: Risk index weighting: Residential zone (distribution suspension area +40%), complaint filing history (+30%), family record score linkage (+15%), social network risk index (+12%), other.
story.case_1050_c.2: In other words: living in a poor area and having reported a food shortage means you're classified as a future criminal.
story.case_1050_c.3: Knowing this — how will you process it?
story.case_1050_c.choice.0: Follow the algorithm result and register
story.case_1050_c.choice.1: I cannot process using these criteria
story.case_1050_d.0: You accessed the raw data behind the prediction.
story.case_1050_d.1: Jeong Yura. Zone C-7 resident. 2 welfare complaints filed. Son's record score: 8 (Priority Surveillance Target).
story.case_1050_d.2: 87% predicted risk. The actual basis: she is statistically likely to protest her son's classification.
story.case_1050_d.3: The system is trying to erase the people who might speak up — before they do.
story.day9_end.3: RECORD is no longer just recording what happened. It's recording what will happen.
story.day10_morning.1: Auditor Park Doyeong's monitor is angled differently than yesterday.
story.day10_morning.2: Positioned to see your screen more clearly.
story.day10_morning.3: You switch on your monitor. What kind of day will this be.
story.day10_morning.choice.0: A formal interview request has arrived from Auditor Park Doyeong
story.day10_morning.choice.1: Lee Junhyeok has left a note
story.day10_morning.choice.2: The authorization code trace results have arrived
story.day10_formal_interview.0: Conference Room 2. Park Doyeong set a stack of documents on the table.
story.day10_formal_interview.1: Your entire file processing record for the past two weeks.
story.day10_formal_interview.2: "There are a few things that require explanation."
story.day10_formal_interview.3: He pointed to specific file numbers as he spoke. His voice remained calm.
story.day10_formal_interview.choice.2: Which specific records are in question?
story.day10_interview_push.0: Park Doyeong paused. Then pointed to two file numbers.
story.day10_interview_push.1: "Cases #1049 and #1050. Could you explain the basis for your processing decisions?"
story.day10_interview_push.2: Your hands stiffened when he said those names.
story.day10_interview_push.3: He knows. The question is how much.
story.day10_ally_memo.0: Lee Junhyeok had left a note in your desk drawer.
story.day10_ally_memo.1: "Something similar happened three years ago. The employee who raised objections then — they're not here anymore."
story.day10_ally_memo.2: "It wasn't a resignation. One day the file closed — their file."
story.day10_ally_memo.3: You couldn't tell if it was a warning, a fact, or both.
story.day10_code_trace.0: The authorization code trace results arrived.
story.day10_code_trace.1: Records Bureau → Urban Planning Division, Special Projects Team 2 → [REDACTED].
story.day10_code_trace.2: No name. But the team is identified: Special Projects Team 2, Urban Planning.
story.day10_code_trace.3: This team was the final step in the redevelopment approval chain.
story.case_1051.1: Subject: Yun Sihyeon / Grade: Records Processing Level 2 / Tenure: 5 years
story.case_1051.2: Offense: Unauthorized file access (12 instances), retention of unapproved personal notes, delayed processing of 3 directives.
story.case_1051.3: Additional record: "Multiple access instances confirmed for files related to distribution suspension zones."
story.case_1051.choice.0: Process disciplinary action by the book
story.case_1051_a.0: Disciplinary action registered. Yun Sihyeon / Level 2 / Removed from post.
story.case_1051_a.1: Five years of service was processed today as 'Disciplinary Closure'.
story.case_1051_a.2: The notes he had kept were all deleted from the system.
story.case_1051_a.3: And what he had spent five years trying to find — with them.
story.case_1051_b.0: Processed as a warning. Yun Sihyeon retains his position.
story.case_1051_b.2: Whether he actually deleted them — unknown.
story.case_1051_c.0: You opened the access history. Five years of records.
story.case_1051_c.1: 12 unauthorized files — all distribution suspension zones, all redevelopment-adjacent cases.
story.case_1051_c.2: He had been tracking the same thing for five years.
story.case_1051_c.3: Alone. And no one knew — until this file was opened today.
story.case_1051_d.1: Dated observations. Distribution suspension zones, redevelopment approval patterns, connections between document numbers.
story.case_1051_d.2: It overlapped completely with everything you had discovered over the past ten days.
story.case_1051_d.3: Yun Sihyeon had known since five years ago.
story.case_1051_protect.0: You logged the file as 'Warning — Processed'.
story.case_1051_protect.1: At the same time, you copied the original notes to personal storage.
story.case_1051_protect.2: Five years of records. Several times more than what you had found in ten days.
story.case_1051_protect.3: Yun Sihyeon is still at his desk today. And so are his five years.
story.day10_end.1: Yun Sihyeon. Five years. And the fact that he had been seeing the same things.
story.day10_end.2: You couldn't tell if knowing you weren't alone was a comfort — or something more frightening.
story.day10_end.3: Tomorrow, more files will be waiting.
story.day11_morning.1: The sounds of this office have become familiar.
story.day11_morning.2: Keyboards. Papers turning. And the silence in between.
story.day11_morning.3: You switch on your monitor again today.
story.day11_morning.choice.0: The result of the Kang family hold has come in
story.day11_morning.choice.2: Auditor Park Doyeong's desk is empty
story.day11_hold_expired.0: System notice: "Suspended file — 72 hours elapsed. Processing automatically."
story.day11_hold_expired.1: Kang Hyeonsu / Record Score 8 / Priority Surveillance Target — confirmed.
story.day11_hold_expired.2: Kang Seojun / Pre-emptive Risk Target — tentative registration complete.
story.day11_hold_expired.3: No approval came. The system did not wait.
story.day11_yun_approach.0: Just before lunch, Yun Sihyeon stood quietly beside you.
story.day11_yun_cautious.0: Yun Sihyeon gave a small nod.
story.day11_yun_cautious.1: "...Ah. Right. I must have the wrong person."
story.day11_yun_cautious.2: He turned to leave — but paused for just a moment.
story.day11_yun_cautious.3: "Look up file number 1038 sometime. Three years ago."
story.day11_yun_open.1: "I know how you handled it. Thank you."
story.day11_yun_open.2: "I have five years' worth of notes. They might help."
story.day11_yun_open.3: He set a small USB drive on your desk and returned to his seat.
story.day11_yun_ally.1: "If you read the notes, you'll know. Special Projects Team 2, Urban Planning. I still don't have the final authorizer's name."
story.day11_yun_ally.2: "But there's a way to find it. It should be in today's case file."
story.day11_yun_ally.3: He handed over the USB and returned to his seat. There was much more left unsaid.
story.day11_auditor_gone.0: Auditor Park Doyeong's desk was empty. Since morning.
story.day11_auditor_gone.1: A notice said he had an external meeting until late afternoon.
story.day11_auditor_gone.2: The first day working without his eyes on you.
story.day11_auditor_gone.3: His notepad was lying open on the desk.
story.day11_auditor_notes.0: You looked. Names and file numbers.
story.day11_auditor_notes.1: And one line: "Directing party: Urban Planning Division. Purpose: blocking specific employee file access."
story.day11_auditor_notes.2: This was not a routine audit. It was sent to stop you.
story.day11_auditor_notes.3: And the party that issued the directive was — Urban Planning.
story.case_1052.1: Subject: Seo Minjun / Age 36 / Record Score 58
story.case_1052.2: Offense: Unauthorized leaking of internal information — external media contact and attempted classified document transfer.
story.case_1052.3: Additional record: "Attempted leak contents: internal approval documents for distribution suspension. Media outlet: unconfirmed."
story.case_1052.choice.2: Review the department and the leaked content directly
story.case_1052_a.0: Record registered. Seo Minjun / Record Score 58 → 28.
story.case_1052_a.1: The document he tried to leak was deleted from the system.
story.case_1052_b.0: Processed as a warning. Seo Minjun retains his position.
story.case_1052_b.1: The attempted leak document was logged as 'Recovered'.
story.case_1052_b.2: But what he knows is still in his head.
story.case_1052_b.3: What he does with it — that's his decision.
story.case_1052_c.0: You opened the department field. Special Projects Team 2, Urban Planning Division.
story.case_1052_c.2: The attempted leak: internal approval documents for the distribution suspension redevelopment project. Authorizer's name included.
story.case_1052_c.3: He knew the authorizer's name. And he was trying to get it out.
story.case_1052_c.choice.2: Preserve the original document before it's deleted
story.case_1052_protect.0: You logged the file as 'Warning — Processed' and copied the original to personal storage.
story.case_1052_protect.1: The authorizer's name was there. Three syllables.
story.case_1052_protect.2: For the first time, everything had a name at its end.
story.case_1052_protect.3: That person is still somewhere in the Urban Planning Division right now.
story.day11_end.1: Yun Sihyeon. Seo Minjun. Park Doyeong. And Urban Planning.
story.day12_morning.0: Day 12. The name from last night won't leave your head.
story.day12_morning.1: Three syllables. And everything connected to them.
story.day12_morning.2: You turn on your terminal. Files are waiting, as always.
story.day12_morning.choice.0: Track down the name from last night.
story.day12_name_research.0: You search the name in the records access system.
story.day12_name_research.1: Cha Minseok. Deputy Director, Urban Planning Bureau. Eight-year tenure. Non-standing advisor to the Redevelopment Steering Committee.
story.day12_name_research.2: His official record is spotless. But you know where that name appeared.
story.day12_name_research.3: He is the architect of the city's restructuring. And everyone who disappeared in the process was handled through RECORD.
story.day12_auditor_confront.0: Park Doyeong's desk is empty unusually early today.
story.day12_auditor_confront.1: He pauses when he sees you. He looks a little more tired than yesterday.
story.day12_auditor_confront.2: You know he was assigned here to watch you. He doesn't know that you know.
story.day12_auditor_confront.choice.0: Say nothing. Return to your desk.
story.day12_auditor_confront.choice.1: Ask why he was assigned here.
story.day12_auditor_confront.choice.2: Hint that you saw his notebook last night.
story.day12_auditor_react.1: His voice drops slightly. He avoids your eyes for a moment.
story.day12_auditor_react.2: 'Nothing for you to worry about.' You can't tell if it's a reassurance or a warning.
story.day12_auditor_react_reveal.0: Park Doyeong freezes. A silence settles.
story.day12_auditor_react_reveal.1: 'You saw it.' He says quietly. 'I don't know the full picture either.'
story.day12_auditor_react_reveal.2: 'It was an order from above. I wasn't told the specific reason. I still don't know it.'
story.day12_auditor_react_reveal.3: He looks away. 'I won't be here this afternoon.'
story.day12_yun_archive.0: You open the drive Yun Sihyeon gave you. Five years of files, sorted by date.
story.day12_yun_archive.1: Each file number has a short handwritten note alongside the date. 'Redevelopment Zone 3.' 'Petition leader involved.' 'List of opposing residents.'
story.day12_yun_archive.2: A pattern emerges. Just before each redevelopment announcement, residents who had voiced opposition were registered in RECORD first.
story.day12_yun_archive.3: This is not coincidence. The system was designed for redevelopment.
story.case_1053.1: Oh Yujin / 43 / Representative, Anti-Urban Redevelopment Petition / Charge: Incitement / Priority: Urgent
story.case_1053.2: The authorizer's signature block is at the bottom of the document. The name has been blurred.
story.case_1053.3: Oh Yujin. The woman who led the opposition movement. What she 'incited' was a fight to keep her home.
story.case_1053.choice.1: Place the file on hold. Flag for additional review.
story.case_1053_a.1: Oh Yujin's file is processed. The petition is withdrawn.
story.case_1053_a.2: You stamped it even though you knew whose name was behind it.
story.case_1053_b.0: Hold placed. Flagged for additional review.
story.case_1053_b.1: The upper system schedules a re-review notification within seven days.
story.case_1053_b.2: Oh Yujin has seven more days. Whether that changes anything is unclear.
story.case_1053_c.0: You cross-reference against the drive's data.
story.case_1053_c.1: Oh Yujin's name appears in Yun Sihyeon's records too. First registered in RECORD two years ago — three days before the Zone 3 redevelopment announcement.
story.case_1053_c.2: She was targeted before the redevelopment was even made public.
story.case_1053_c.3: The system predicts opposition and pre-emptively processes those predicted to oppose.
story.case_1053_d.0: You lean in and examine the signature block.
story.case_1053_d.1: Through the blur, you read the name. Cha Minseok.
story.case_1053_d.2: Deputy Director, Urban Planning. The same hand, the same name, signing Oh Yujin's disposal order.
story.case_1053_d.3: He didn't just give the orders. He personally signed the execution commands.
story.case_1053_d.choice.0: Hold the file and document the signature.
story.case_1053_protect.0: Hold placed. Authorizer signature scan saved. Cross-classified.
story.case_1053_protect.1: Your hand trembles for a moment.
story.case_1053_protect.2: Cha Minseok's name is now recorded in your files too.
story.case_1053_protect.3: This could become evidence. And that means you've become a target.
story.day12_end.1: You know the name. You know which files it's attached to.
story.day12_end.2: But knowing and being able to do something about it are different things.
story.day12_end_expose.1: Cha Minseok's name has now been officially linked to a file — by you.
story.day12_end_expose.2: Somewhere, someone has received an alert. You know it.
story.day13_morning.0: Day 13. The office is quieter than yesterday.
story.day13_morning.1: Something has changed. You can feel it.
story.day13_morning.choice.1: Check the status of the saved evidence file.
story.day13_auditor_gone.0: Park Doyeong's desk is empty. Completely.
story.day13_auditor_gone.1: Not even his things remain. As if he was never here.
story.day13_auditor_gone.2: Only a single note on the desk. 'Be careful. —D'
story.day13_evidence_secure.0: You check the status of the encrypted evidence file.
story.day13_evidence_secure.1: The file itself is intact. But the access log shows an external query attempt from last night.
story.day13_ally_contact.0: Lee Junhyeok passes by and slips you a note.
story.day13_ally_contact.1: 'There's one more person who knows Cha Minseok's name. Records storage room, sixth floor. A man named Park Jaewon.'
story.day13_ally_contact.2: Park Jaewon. You file the name away.
story.case_1054.1: Park Jaewon / 51 / Former employee, Urban Planning Special Projects Team 2 / Unauthorized information leak / Priority: Urgent
story.case_1054.2: He worked in Urban Planning until three years ago. The nature of the information he attempted to leak is not stated.
story.case_1054.3: Urgent disposal. Completion required by end of day.
story.case_1054.choice.1: Place the file on hold. Flag for additional review.
story.case_1054.choice.2: Look up Park Jaewon's employment history.
story.case_1054_a.2: Whatever he knew disappears with him.
story.case_1054_b.0: Hold placed. Flagged for additional review.
story.case_1054_b.1: A refusal against an urgent disposal request. A notification demanding explanation will follow.
story.case_1054_b.2: Park Jaewon has time. Whether that changes anything is unclear.
story.case_1054_c.0: You pull up Park Jaewon's employment record.
story.case_1054_c.1: Former member of Urban Planning Special Projects Team 2. Direct subordinate of Cha Minseok. Abrupt resignation three years ago.
story.case_1054_c.2: The 'information' he tried to leak was an internal report from Special Projects Team 2 — three years ago. Now a sealed file.
story.case_1054_c.3: He knows what Cha Minseok did. That is why the disposal order was issued.
story.case_1054_d.0: You examine the authorizer's signature block.
story.case_1054_d.1: Cha Minseok. The same signature you saw on Oh Yujin's file yesterday.
story.case_1054_d.2: Park Jaewon is Cha Minseok's former subordinate. And Cha Minseok personally signed his disposal order.
story.case_1054_d.choice.0: Hold the file and protect Park Jaewon.
story.case_1054_protect.0: Hold placed. Evidence linkage note added to Park Jaewon's file.
story.case_1054_protect.1: The fact that Cha Minseok personally signed a disposal order for his own former subordinate is now on record.
story.case_1054_protect.2: As long as Park Jaewon is alive, what he knows stays alive.
story.case_1054_protect.3: You took the greatest risk yet today. For that.
story.day13_end.1: Park Doyeong is gone. Cha Minseok's name is connected to more and more files.
story.day13_end.2: You feel alone inside this building.
story.day13_end_resistance.1: Park Jaewon is alive. Cha Minseok's silencing signature is on record.
story.day13_end_resistance.2: It was the most dangerous day of everything you've done so far.
story.day13_end_resistance.3: And tomorrow, RECORD will know it.
story.day14_morning.0: Day 14. The moment you arrive, the air feels different.
story.day14_morning.choice.0: Check whether Park Jaewon has made contact.
story.day14_morning.choice.1: Try to access the saved evidence file.
story.day14_jaewon_contact.0: A small note is wedged into the gap of your desk drawer.
story.day14_jaewon_contact.1: 'I have the original report from three years ago. Cha Minseok's signed copy. If you can meet — sixth floor, behind the stairwell.'
story.day14_jaewon_contact.2: Park Jaewon is moving on his own.
story.day14_jaewon_meet.0: Lunchtime. Behind the stairwell on the sixth floor, at the storage room entrance.
story.day14_jaewon_meet.1: Park Jaewon hands over an envelope. 'This is the report from three years ago. A list of citizens to be registered before the redevelopment was announced.'
story.day14_jaewon_meet.2: 'Cha Minseok wrote it himself and signed it. I was in that room.'
story.day14_jaewon_meet.3: Inside the envelope: hand-copied documents and Cha Minseok's handwritten signature.
story.day14_lockdown.0: You try to access the evidence file you saved.
story.day14_lockdown.1: The system doesn't respond. A quarantine order has been placed on the file.
story.day14_lockdown.2: The file exists, but all official access pathways have been blocked.
story.day14_lockdown.3: Only your personal copy remains. For now.
story.day14_network_report.0: A message is waiting on the encrypted channel.
story.day14_network_report.1: 'Internal command structure received. Next step — press liaison required. Your decision is needed.'
story.day14_network_report.2: This means going outside. In a direction that cannot be undone.
story.day14_network_accept.0: 'There is no coming back from this path.'
story.day14_network_accept.1: You stare at the sentence for a moment.
story.day14_network_accept.2: You stopped being able to come back a long time ago.
story.case_1055.1: Kim Dohyeon / 38 / Former journalist / Unauthorized reportage preparation / Priority: Critical
story.case_1055.2: He attempted to disclose the existence of RECORD externally. Investigation notes seized. Immediate disposal requested.
story.case_1055.choice.2: Review Kim Dohyeon's seized investigation notes.
story.case_1055.choice.3: Verify whether this is the same person the network intended to connect with.
story.case_1055_a.1: Kim Dohyeon's file is processed. His notes are destroyed.
story.case_1055_a.2: RECORD maintains its silence today as well.
story.case_1055_b.1: A refusal of a critical-priority order. The upper system immediately sends a reprocessing request.
story.case_1055_b.2: Kim Dohyeon has one more day.
story.case_1055_c.0: You access the list of seized investigation notes.
story.case_1055_c.1: 'Rapid increase in RECORD processing linked to redevelopment. Suspected existence of Special Projects Team 2. Whistleblower contact in progress.'
story.case_1055_c.2: He knew. He knew there was a whistleblower. He knew a report existed.
story.case_1055_c.3: And the person trying to stop it just handed you his file.
story.case_1055_d.0: You cross-reference the contact information from the network against this file.
story.case_1055_d.1: It matches. Kim Dohyeon is the exact journalist the network intended to connect with.
story.case_1055_d.2: His disposal order landed on your screen today.
story.case_1055_protect.0: Critical disposal order refused. Hold placed. File sealed.
story.case_1055_protect.1: You just defied a RECORD command.
story.case_1055_protect.2: Kim Dohyeon is alive. So is what he knows.
story.case_1055_protect.3: Somewhere inside RECORD, your name has started to appear.
story.day14_end.1: Cha Minseok. Park Jaewon. Kim Dohyeon. These names connect into a single line.
story.day14_end.2: At the end of that line, there is you.
story.day14_end_act3.1: You defied RECORD's critical-priority command. The journalist is alive.
story.day14_end_act3.2: Somewhere in the system, a nameless file was likely created.
